steps.title: Use Sameer's reaction
steps.content: Sameer notices guiltily that all the other shop assistants are already in place. Guilt suggests he thinks he has failed to meet an expectation.

steps.title: Reject unsupported feelings
steps.content:
• Choice B says he is mesmerized by jalebi, but the scene detail does not show that.
  • Choice C says he is overwhelmed by chaos, but the assistants are described as attentive.
  • Choice D says he is happy, contradicting guiltily.

steps.title: Infer why he feels guilty
steps.content: Because the other assistants are already working, Sameer's guilt most reasonably suggests remorse about arriving later than they did. The answer is A.
